title: Sales Prompt Pack
description: AI prompts for discovery calls, objection handling, pipeline analysis, and sales process documentation.

prompts.title: Discovery Call Prep
prompts.prompt: I have a discovery call with [name] at [company]. They are a [role] at a [company size] company in [industry]. Their company does [what they do]. Help me prepare: 1) 5 research-backed questions to ask about their challenges with [your domain], 2) 3 potential pain points they likely face, 3) How to position my product ([description]) for their specific situation.
prompts.context: Use 15 minutes before every discovery call to prepare personalised questions.

prompts.title: Objection Response Generator
prompts.prompt: A prospect just told me: '[exact objection]'. My product is [description] and it costs [price]. Help me respond using this framework: 1) Acknowledge their concern, 2) Reframe the objection, 3) Provide evidence or a case study, 4) Ask a follow-up question. Give me 2 response options — one direct and one consultative.
prompts.context: Use immediately after hearing an objection you have not handled before.

prompts.title: Follow-Up Email Drafter
prompts.prompt: I just had a [discovery call / demo / meeting] with [name] at [company]. Key points discussed: [list 3-5 points]. Their main pain was [pain]. Next step we agreed on: [next step]. Write a follow-up email that: summarises what we discussed, reinforces the value proposition for their specific situation, confirms the next step, and is under 150 words.
prompts.context: Use within 1 hour of every sales call to send a prompt follow-up.

prompts.title: Pipeline Analysis
prompts.prompt: Here is my current sales pipeline: [list deals with stage, value, and age in days]. Help me analyse: 1) Which deals are at risk (stuck too long or no clear next step)? 2) What is my realistic close rate based on the stages? 3) What actions should I prioritise this week? 4) Is my pipeline coverage sufficient for my [quarterly target]?
prompts.context: Use during your weekly pipeline review to get an outside perspective.

prompts.title: Sales Process Documenter
prompts.prompt: I need to document my sales process so I can train a new hire. Here is how I sell: [describe your process from first contact to close in 5-10 sentences]. Help me turn this into a structured playbook with: 1) Clear stages with entry/exit criteria, 2) Key activities at each stage, 3) Templates for each touchpoint, 4) Qualification criteria, 5) Common objections and responses.
prompts.context: Use when preparing to hire your first sales rep.
